rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 21, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT JOSUE HERNANDEZ AND ALFONSO MALDONADO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Off calendar, dismissal filed on 3/19/13. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, March 21, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HERRERA'S Ntc Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Deny. Defendant failed to show mistake, surprise or excusable neglect. Defendant was served on 2/21/13 and understood that she had 5 days to answer. See email dated 2/22/13 @ 12:33am. = (501/REQ)
